page_content:
Repeatable to: 4 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. HLSA785 or HLSA778.

HLSA780 Qualitative Methods for Health Services Research (3 Credits) This practice-based learning course will include orientation to the major paradigms in qualitative inquiry, developing research questions suitable for qualitative study, and an in-depth exploration of qualitative research methodologies and methods, particularly as they are applied in health services research. Students will collect, analyze, and present qualitative data using techniques learned in this course. The course will provide students with the foundational skills to conduct their own qualitative studies.

Credit Only Granted for. HLSA780 or HLTH625.
